item.title: Morning Bid: Fingers crossed for a resolution
item.description: A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Rae Wee

item.title: Korean AI chip startup DeepX prepares public share offering
item.description: South Korean AI chip вҖӢstartup DeepX said вҖҢon Tuesday it is preparing to вҖӢlist its shares вҖӢdomestically, adding the firm вҒ is open вҖӢto a possible U.S. вҖӢlisting after that.

item.title: OpenAI's $852 billion valuation faces investor scrutiny amid strategy shift, FT reports
item.description: OpenAI's $852 billion valuation is under scrutiny from some of its own backers вҖӢas the company shifts its focus to the enterprise вҖҢmarket to fend off competition from Anthropic, the Financial Times reported on Tuesday.

item.title: Bessent says Fed should 'wait and see' before lowering rates, Semafor reports
item.description: The Federal Reserve should "wait and see" before вҖӢdeciding whether to lower interest rates amid the war вҖҢin Iran, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told Semafor Editor-in-Chief Ben Smith on Monday.

item.title: China's export engine stutters as Iran war wipes out AI-driven gains
item.description: China's export engine slowed вҖӢin March as buyers chasing an AI-fuelled future ran into the hard reality of war in the Middle East, вҖҢwhich has sparked an energy shock and complicated Beijing's push to keep growth on track.

item.title: Amazon nears deal to buy Globalstar, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: Amazon is in вҖӢadvanced talks to вҖҢacquire satellite telecom group вҖӢGlobalstar , a deal that вҖӢwould bolster the tech major's push to вҒ build its вҖӢown satellite вҖӢoperation, Bloomberg News reported on Monday.

item.title: Stocks gain, oil and dollar retreat on hopes for US-Iran resolution
item.description: Asian stocks advanced while oil prices and the safe-haven dollar fell on Tuesday as the U.S. said it continued to engage with Tehran to make a вҖӢdeal even as it blocked Iran's ports after the collapse of peace talks over the weekend.

item.title: Nissan to streamline global lineup to 45 models from 56
item.description: Nissan Motor said вҖӢon Tuesday it plans вҖҢto streamline its global lineup to 45 вҖӢmodels from вҖӢ56 and seek to deploy вҒ its artificial вҖӢintelligence driving technology across вҖӢ90% of its lineup over the long term.

item.title: Australian business sentiment crashes in March on worries about fallout from Iran war
item.description: Australian business confidence plunged last month by a magnitude only seen during financial crises as вҖӢthe Iran war gave rise to a global вҖҢoil shock, a survey showed on Tuesday.

item.title: Dollar steady as US blocks Iranian ships, talks continue
item.description: The dollar вҖӢwas largely steady on Tuesday as investors weighed supply risks stemming from a U.S. blockade of Iranian вҖҢships in the Strait of Hormuz against the prospect of continued dialogue between Washington and Tehran that could lead to a breakthrough.

item.title: Exclusive: United CEO Kirby raised potential tie-up with American in Trump meeting
item.description: United Airlines CEO вҖӢScott Kirby raised вҖҢthe potential of merging with American вҖӢAirlines in вҖӢa meeting with U.S. вҒ President Donald вҖӢTrump in late вҖӢFebruary, two sources told Reuters.

item.title: Qantas lifts fuel cost forecast as Middle East war jolts oil markets
item.description: Australia's Qantas Airways said on Tuesday it has raised its fuel cost outlook and has not вҖӢstarted its planned share buyback, citing sharply higher and volatile jet вҖҢfuel prices after the war in the Middle East cut oil supply.

item.title: Surging petrol prices drive record EV sales in Europe in March
item.description: High petrol prices in Europe steered car buyers towards EVs in a record-beating March, and led to the first month of global вҖӢEV sales growth this year, data by consultancy Benchmark Mineral вҖҢIntelligence showed on Tuesday.

item.title: United Airlines CEO pitched possible combination with rival American, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby has floated a вҖӢpossible combination with rival American Airlines вҖҢGroup , Bloomberg News reported on Monday, citing people familiar with the talks.

item.title: Millions of Rockstar Games business records stolen, hacking group says
item.description: A hacking group with a history of compromising major global corporations said it had stolen nearly 80 million records вҖӢfrom video game developer Rockstar Games, the maker of Grand вҖҢTheft Auto.

item.title: US crude futures fall over $1 as traders weigh supply risks
item.description: U.S. crude futures fell more вҖӢthan $1 in early вҖӢAsian trade on Tuesday вҒ as traders balanced вҖӢheightened supply risks linked вҖӢto a U.S. blockade of Iranian shipping in the вҖӢStrait of Hormuz вҖӢwith reports that Washington and Tehran вҖҢwere вҒ still open to talks after a tense meeting in Islamabad.

item.title: Bloom Energy to supply up to 2.8 GW of fuel cells under expanded Oracle deal
item.description: Bloom Energy said on Monday it would supply Oracle with up to 2.8 вҖӢgigawatts of fuel cell capacity under вҖҢan expanded deal as rising artificial intelligence use drives up power consumption.

item.title: Bending Spoons cuts Eventbrite staff, rolls out product changes after takeover
item.description: Eventbrite's new owner, Italian tech company Bending Spoons, said on Monday it had cut a large portion of the вҖӢAmerican ticketing platform's pre-acquisition workforce and implemented broad product вҖҢchanges in the weeks following the deal closure.

item.title: FedEx CFO John Dietrich to step down
item.description: FedEx said on Monday Chief Financial вҖӢOfficer John Dietrich would step down, вҖҢeffective June 1, after the parcel firm completes the spinoff of FedEx Freight into a publicly traded company.

item.title: TRADING DAY US stocks gain, dollar dips on hopes for Iran war negotiations
item.description: Wall Street's main indexes rallied to close sharply higher on Monday as hopes for de-escalation in the Middle East helped investors look past the failed U.S.-Iran talks and focus on the start of first-quarter earnings season.

item.title: Financial Stability Board chair warns of stability "triple whammy" as funding conditions tighten
item.description: The global financial system has so far absorbed the economic shock caused by the вҖӢIran war, partly thanks to post-2008 crisis вҖҢreforms, but rising funding costs may exacerbate growing stress in other parts of the system, the chair of вҖӢthe Financial Stability Board warned the G20 вҖӢon Monday.

item.title: World Liberty investor Justin Sun claims Trump crypto venture 'secretly' installed tool to freeze user holdings
item.description: A major investor in U.S. President Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial crypto venture has claimed вҖӢthat the firm "secretly" implemented a tool to unilaterally freeze and restrict private holdings of its WLFI token.

item.title: NY Fed says paper loss on bond holdings shrank last year
item.description: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York said on Monday that вҖӢthe U.S. central bank had a smaller unrealized loss on its expansive bond holdings last year relative to 2024.

item.title: Anthropic talking to the Trump administration about its next AI model, co-founder says
item.description: Anthropic is discussing its frontier AI model Mythos with the Trump administration, the firm's co-founder said on Monday, even вҖӢafter the Pentagon cut off business with the U.S. вҖҢAI company following a contract dispute.

item.title: Brazil's top labor inspector fired for adding China's BYD to 'dirty list,' sources say
item.description: Brazil's secretary вҖӢof labor inspection was fired for adding Chinese automaker BYD to a registry of employers accused of вҖҢsubjecting workers to conditions described by the government as similar to slavery, two people close to the matter told Reuters.

item.title: AI-boosted hacks with AnthropicвҖҷs Mythos could have dire consequences for banks
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos, a new AI model the company and cybersecurity experts warn could supercharge complex cyberattacks, вҖӢposes significant challenges to the banking industry with its legacy technology systems, experts said in the days following the model's announcement.

item.title: Middle East war drives up Codelco copper costs in Chile
item.description: Price surges due to the вҖӢMiddle East war have raised costs for вҖҢthe world's top-producing copper miner Codelco, yet the Chilean state-run firm is still on track to meet its вҖӢ2026 production target, Chairman Maximo Pacheco told Reuters вҖӢon Monday.

item.title: Texas attorney general probes Lululemon over potential 'forever chemicals' in its activewear
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into athleisure brand Lululemon over the potential presence of "forever chemicals" вҖӢin its activewear, he said on Monday in a вҖҢpost on social-media platform X.

item.title: Exclusive: Manulife Investment Management eyes Cellnex Swiss business, sources say
item.description: Spain's Cellnex is in talks to sell its stake in its Swiss вҖӢunit to Toronto-listed Manulife Financial Corporation's investment management вҖҢunit, according to two sources with knowledge of the situation.

item.title: Hollywood stars sign open letter opposing Paramount-Warner Bros deal
item.description: Over 1,000 filmmakers, actors and industry professionals signed an open letter opposing Warner Bros Discovery's вҖӢproposed $110 billion merger with Paramount Skydance, warning it вҖҢwould reduce competition and deepen consolidation in the U.S. media sector.
